example.message: Your post has been saved as draft.

post.description: Uploads a file reference using its file id. This file should be an image created by DALL·E or uploaded by the user. JPG, WEBP and PNG are supported for post creation.

mediaType.description: It will be type of media and it should be one from the below mentioned media type.

media.description: Media url to be uploaded, if user provides media url then openaiFileIdRefs will be empty array. Don't pass any value in this field other than media url provided by user.

message.description: Message to understand what went wrong

url.description: Media url in which error has occurred

post.description: Downgrades membership for selected products (SocialPilot, Reviews, or both).

products.description: Product identifiers. 1 = SocialPilot, 2 = Reviews. Empty or not passed means SocialPilot.

post.description: Reactivates membership for a selected product or all products.

productId.description: Product identifier. 1 = SocialPilot, 2 = Reviews. If not provided, then SocialPilot will be reactivated.

membershipId.description: Optional membership ID. If not provided, the previous membership will be used.

post.description: Changes the membership plan. If productId is not provided, the plan will be applied to the SocialPilot.

billingAccess.description: Access to subscription and billing settings

analyticsAccess.description: Grants permission to view analytics data and reports for assigned accounts.

inboxAccess.description: Grants access to the Social Inbox module, enabling the user to view, manage, and respond to messages, comments, and conversations across permitted accounts.

libraryAccess.description: Grants access to the content library for viewing and using saved media assets and content while creating posts.

maxConnectAccounts.description: Maximum accounts client can connect. 'MAX' for unlimited or a number.

autoApprove.description: Auto approve posts without manual approval

accounts.description: Array of account IDs the user has access to

accountCount.description: Number of accounts user want to add

role.description: Role to be assigned to the user. Supported values: A (Admin), M (Manager), C (Content Scheduler), CL (Client). You may also use full role labels such as ADMIN, MANAGER, CONTENT_SCHEDULER, or CLIENT.

accounts.description: Required for account-scoped roles like MANAGER, CONTENT_SCHEDULER, and CLIENT

items.description: Login ID selected by the user (social media accounts).

loginIds.description: Array of Login IDs selected by the user (social media accounts).
